page.title: Schedule – Quantum Martial Arts San Francisco
page.meta_description: We offer martial arts classes for adults (ages 13+) nine times a week, martial arts classes for kids (ages 6–9) three times a week, martial arts classes for pre-K (ages 4–5) three times a week, and even martial arts classes for teens (ages 10–14) three times a week. content.visible_text: Schedule We offer martial arts classes for adults (ages 13+) nine times a week, martial arts classes for kids (ages 6–9) three times a week, martial arts classes for pre-K (ages 4–5) three times a week, and even martial arts classes for teens (ages 10–14) three times a week. We also host quarterly free community workshops, which are open to the public. Beginners and new students are always welcome, and your first week of trial classes is free! Please let us know you are coming by filling out this quick form . For current students, access our  virtual schedule here . For our latest up-to-date schedule consult and subscribe to our Google Calendars: Quarks Kids Teens Adults Events Reviews Facebook Community Dojo Quantum Martial Arts is a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit in the State of California, and we thrive on the generosity of people like you. All donations are tax-deductible. Quantum’s tax ID number is 26-1534597. No donation is too small, or too large. Whether it’s $20 or $20,000, every cent will be hugely appreciated and put to good use. Support Our Kids Donate now to support our youth scholarship program which allows families in need to train at reduced cost. We believe investment in our community involves investing in our youth. Our Sister Schools Our Seattle Dojo has served thousands of students since opening on Capitol Hill in 1995, and currently offers youth and adult classes in the Central District. Our Portland Dojo was established in 2020, and currently offers youth and adult classes in Southeast Portland. A WordPress.com Website .
